name: Les Halles de Pau
summary: A practical pre-Pyrenees provisioning stop for bread, cheese, charcuterie, fruit, pastries, and quick hall dining before the Tourmalet/Gavarnie day.
whyItMatters: Stage 6 is logistically fragile; a market run in Pau can solve lunch/snack uncertainty before roads, mountain access, and crowds take over.
pros: Official page lists broad food categories and many traders
Morning hours are aligned with a race-day supply run
Parking and bus access information is published
cons: Halles are closed Mondays and individual merchants vary between 13:00 and 15:00 closing
If the group is not actually passing through Pau in the morning, it may be a detour

logistics.opening_hours: Halles des etaliers Tuesday-Saturday 7:00-13:00 or 15:00 depending on merchants; Sunday 9:00-13:00 or 15:00; closed Monday. Carreau des producteurs Tuesday, Wednesday, Friday, Saturday 7:00-13:00.
logistics.takeaway_options: Strong; official trader list includes bakery-pastry, cheese, charcuterie, fruit/vegetables, traiteurs, and more.
logistics.distance_from_base: Unknown until Pyrenees base is confirmed; central Pau.
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Not near Tourmalet/Gavarnie viewing itself; use before driving south.
logistics.transit: Official page lists bus stops Les Halles Mediatheques, Les Halles Plante, and Les Halles Republique.
logistics.parking: Official page lists underground Halles Republique parking open 24/7 with first half-hour free.
logistics.road_closure_notes: No specific Tour de France closure note on the Halles page; verify Pau stage-start traffic plans.

timing.best_visit_window: Early morning on the Stage 6 approach, or previous day if staying near Pau.
timing.race_day_risk: Medium because stage-start traffic in Pau may affect access despite normal market hours.

sources.title: Les Halles de Pau official home page
sources.note: Supports market concept, food/dining role, address, broad product mix, and trader context.

sources.title: Les Halles de Pau practical information
sources.note: Supports exact hours, bus access, parking, and trader categories.

open_questions: Confirm official Stage 6 Pau road-closure and parking plan.
Decide whether provisioning should happen in Pau or closer to the Pyrenees base.
